title: periboea corymbosa
intro: Periboea corymbosa, also known as the "Fairy Apple," is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae. The medicinal properties of Periboea corymbosa include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Periboea corymbosa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
